历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum science ranking was approximately 123 → 274 → 311 → 363, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 240 positions in the last 3 years. Based on abnormal signals from national admission cutoffs, the baseline ranking is estimated at about 400. The provincial science enrollment plan was 17 from 2021 to 2024; in 2026, the Physics Category has 7 plus Medicine 10, totaling 17, unchanged from 2025, with no change in the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 18th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (Top 20), with stable rankings in recent years; reputation in 2026 is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents; a gap in Henan in 2022 (high attention), abnormal admission cutoffs in 2025 (low attention); Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 26th overall), with moderate to high attention; 17 A- and above disciplines including Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with top engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Civil and architectural majors continue to be polarized and wait-and-see (the trend of discouragement is easing but still relatively cold), Computer/Electronic Information/Electrical Engineering are highly recommended, Clinical Medicine/Stomatology are recommended; in 2026, the number of science examinees in the province is about 30,672, a slight increase from 30,457 in 2025, with slightly intensified competition; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, with very few enrollments in Qinghai Province (about 3 in recent years), accounting for less than 0.4%, and the cross-province application popularity is limitedly affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in provincial examinees, and negative reputation signals, competition is expected to intensify slightly on the basis of a baseline of about 400 in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 420, with a range of 370–470.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 同济大学医学类在青海省近三年（2022-2024）最低录取位次分别为193名（2022年，计划6人）、311名（2023年，计划6人）、363名（2024年，计划8人），呈逐年下降趋势（位 次数字逐年增大），反映医学类报考竞争持续加剧。2021年与2025年无单独医学类数据块，故跳过。2026年医学类招生计划大幅扩招至10人（较2024年增加2人，增幅25%），其中 临床医学（5+3一体化）5人、医学试验班（临床）3人、口腔医学2人，扩招幅度显著，对位次有一定下拉效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科依托同济大学深厚的工科底蕴和上海 地域优势，临床医学专业历史悠久，声誉卓著，在考生中具有极高的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业尤其受到高分考生青睐。同济大学位于上海市，地域优势明显，对青海省考生吸引力强。202 6年新增口腔医学专业单独招生，进一步丰富了医学类选择，预计会吸引更多优秀考生报考。青海省医学类招生规模整体较小，同济大学医学类计划从8人扩至10人，虽有所增加但 总量仍有限，竞争格局依然激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算与近年位次趋势，预测2026年同济大学医学类在青海省最低录取位次约为427名，较2024年（363名）位次数字继续增大（更难进），主要受医学报考热度 持续上升、新增口腔医学专业吸引更多考生等因素驱动。扩招25%对位次有一定缓解作用，但不足以抵消热度上升的影响。预计录取位次在397至457名之间波动。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学试验班（临床）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间397-457名内，建议以二档口腔医学为主攻方向，一档临床医学（5+3一体化）作为冲刺，三档医学试验班（临床）作为稳妥保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Tongji University's medical category in Qinghai Province over the past three years (2022-2024) were 193rd (2022, planned 6 students), 311th (2023, planned 6 students), and 363rd (2024, planned 8 students), showing a year-on-year downward trend (ranking numbers increasing year by year), reflecting intensifying competition for medical applications. No separate medical data blocks for 2021 and 2025, so skipped. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan significantly expands to 10 students (an increase of 2 from 2024, a 25% increase), including 5 for Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated), 3 for Medical Experimental Class (Clinical), and 2 for Stomatology. The expansion is significant, exerting a certain downward pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines rely on Tongji University's profound engineering foundation and Shanghai's regional advantages. The clinical medicine program has a long history and outstanding reputation, holding extremely high appeal among candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors nationwide has continued to rise, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, with obvious regional advantages, strongly attracting candidates from Qinghai Province. In 2026, the new separate enrollment for Stomatology further enriches medical options, expected to attract more outstanding candidates. The overall scale of medical enrollment in Qinghai Province is relatively small. Tongji University's medical plan expands from 8 to 10 students, though increased, the total is still limited, and the competition landscape remains intense.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation and recent ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Tongji University's medical category in Qinghai Province in 2026 will be approximately 427th, with the ranking number continuing to increase (harder to enter) compared to 2024 (363rd), mainly driven by factors such as the continuous rise in medical application popularity and the new Stomatology major attracting more candidates. The 25% expansion has some mitigating effect on rankings but is insufficient to offset the impact of rising popularity. The predicted admission ranking is expected to fluctuate between 397th and 457th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 397-457, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Stomatology as the main direction, Tier 1 Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) as a reach, and Tier 3 Medical Experimental Class (Clinical) as a safe backup.
